properties.name: app.jwt.secret
properties.description: Base64-encoded HMAC-SHA256 signing key for JWT generation and validation.

properties.name: app.jwt.expiration-ms
properties.description: JWT token validity in milliseconds (default: 86400000 = 24 hours).

properties.name: app.storage.image-dir
properties.description: Filesystem directory where uploaded tour map images are stored. Supports absolute and relative paths.

properties.name: app.storage.max-file-size-bytes
properties.description: Maximum accepted image file size in bytes (default: 10485760 = 10 MB).
